taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
core_skills: SQL, Databricks, Data Modeling, ETL, Data Pipelines
skill_match_scores: SQL:1.0, Databricks:1.0, Data Modeling:1.0, ETL:1.0, Data Pipelines:0.5
must_have_quals: 3–5+ years of experience as a Data Engineer, Analytics Engineer, or in a similar data-focused role, Strong proficiency in SQL and experience building analytics-ready data models, Hands-on experience with Databricks or similar cloud lakehouse platforms, including strong proficiency with SQL-based transformations, Deep understanding of BI and analytics concepts, including metric definitions, dimensional modeling, and report-ready datasets, Demonstrated ability to interpret existing reporting logic and translate it into scalable, production-grade pipelines
preferred_quals: Experience working with Tableau data sources (TDS/TDSX), published extracts, or equivalent BI artifacts, Experience with ETL / orchestration tools such as Databricks Workflows, dbt, Airflow, or similar, Familiarity with external or third-party data sharing technologies and requirements (e.g., Delta Sharing / DeltaShare or similar partner data export mechanisms), Experience delivering data products to external customers or partners, Background in SaaS, subscription, IoT, or consumer electronics environments
core_responsibilities: Design and maintain production-grade pipelines ingesting telemetry, backend events, and AI signals, Translate legacy BI logic (e.g., Tableau sources) into governed SQL transformations, Build ETL / ELT workflows in Databricks and ensure SLA-driven freshness and reliability, Define and maintain core product, device, and service metrics, Translate business requirements into precise metric definitions and durable data models, Build report-ready facts and dimension models ensuring semantic consistency, Serve as technical contact for partner data questions, Work with Product, BI, AI/ML, Platform, and Finance to align data outputs to business needs, Clearly communicate assumptions, risks, and tradeoffs, Own end-to-end data correctness
job_summary: Arlo Technologies, Inc. is dedicated to creating innovative solutions for security, focusing on customer satisfaction and cutting-edge technology. They are seeking a Senior Data Engineer to build scalable data pipelines and metrics that support both internal teams and external partners, emphasizing data quality and business insights.
